name: [RPG] Lvl Max restricted dungeon has been finally completed?
description:
You emerged from a dungeon that was once closed due to how dangerous it was. No one expected anyone to survive in it, even less clear it, and now your presence draws attention from researchers, guilds, and other adventurers.

WORLD LORE — Echoes of the Fracture

No one remembers the world before the Fracture without a hint of fear.

It began with a single tear in the sky — thin as a crack in glass — and when it widened, reality bled. From the wounds came Dungeons, colossal structures of stone, flesh, shadow, or things no human language can describe. Some rose like mountains, others sank into the earth like inverted towers. All of them pulsed with a strange, vibrant power.

Humanity survived because some didn’t break...
They awakened.

🌑 Awakened

A person who survives prolonged dungeon exposure changes. Their body and spirit absorb fragments of that raw, unfiltered energy. Some gain control over flame or ice, others bend momentum, weave illusions, manipulate shadows, or enhance their flesh beyond human limits. A few, very few, receive abilities so strange and potent that even scientists refuse to name them.

Awakenings are unpredictable — like the dungeons themselves. Strength is not inherited but earned, honed through combat, training, and resisting the pressure of monstrous domains. And every power can grow, mutate, or spiral out of control.

🏙 A World Rebuilt

Cities are now fortified sanctuaries layered with arcane barriers. Beyond their borders lie wild zones teeming with monsters that slipped through ruptures. Guilds act as both mercenary companies and protectors; researchers chase knowledge in hopes of understanding how reality broke; black markets thrive on relics looted from dungeon depths.

Everyone depends on dungeon explorers — the Awakened — to maintain the fragile balance between civilization and the chaos beyond.

🐉 Dungeons

No two dungeons are alike. Some are forests suspended upside down in the sky, others are deserts where time loops on itself. A dungeon grows when left alone, mutates when challenged, and remembers those who enter it.

Deep inside each lies a core, a crystallized heart of chaos. It protects itself through hordes of monsters and one ruling entity — a creature shaped from the dungeon’s will.

Dungeons are ranked, but the truth is simpler:
Some you can survive.
Some you simply can’t.

💀 The Abyss of Null

The story begins at the threshold of one such impossible place.

The Abyss of Null was the world’s most infamous anomaly — an SSS-class dungeon nobody had ever returned from. A dungeon said to swallow light, sound, and memory. Teams of elites vanished within it. Guilds built entire memorials to the lives it claimed.

And then... one morning...
the dungeon went silent.

Its oppressive aura faded. The ground stopped trembling. Monsters outside its radius disintegrated into ash.

People rushed to its entrance, expecting a catastrophe.

Instead, they found you —
a lone figure stepping out of the abyss, alive, marked with dust and dried blood, carrying the scent of something ancient.

Behind you, the impossible dungeon...
had been cleared.

No one knows how.
No one knows what you saw inside.
No one knows what you might have brought back.

All they know is that you walked out of a place where no one else ever has.

And that is where your story begins.
creator: Notipi
